zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Neville De Heaton於1247年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯可頓時，她的父親Sir Phillip de Néville38歲，母親Sibylla de Holdenbey37歲。她於大約1267年與John de Hardreshull在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1318年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾雷德布恩享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Neville De Heaton于1247年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯可頓时，她的父亲Sir Phillip de Néville38岁，母亲Sibylla de Holdenbey37岁。她于大约1267年与John de Hardreshull在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1318年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾雷德布恩享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Neville De Heaton was born in 1247, in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Phillip de Néville, was 38 and her mother, Sibylla de Holdenbey, was 37. She married John de Hardreshull about 1267, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1318, in Redbourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Neville De Heaton est née en 1247, à Scotton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Phillip de Néville, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Sibylla de Holdenbey, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé John de Hardreshull environ 1267, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1318, à Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Neville De Heaton 1247 in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Phillip de Néville 38 und ihre Mutter Sibylla de Holdenbey 37. Sie hat um 1267 in England John de Hardreshull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1318 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Redbourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Neville De Heaton è nata il nel 1247 nel Scotton, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Phillip de Néville, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Sibylla de Holdenbey, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato John de Hardreshull circa 1267, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1318, nel Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Neville De Heaton(이)가 1247년 영국 링코실르 스콧에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Phillip de Néville(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibylla de Holdenbey(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1267년 영국에서 John de Hardreshull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 레드보우른에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Neville De Heaton nasceu em 1247, em Scotton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Phillip de Néville, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Sibylla de Holdenbey, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Hardreshull aproximadamente 1267, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1318, em Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Neville De Heaton родилась в 1247 г. в местности скоттон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Phillip de Néville было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibylla de Holdenbey, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Hardreshull около 1267 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1318 г. в местности редбурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan De Neville De Heaton nació en 1247, en Scotton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Phillip de Néville, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Sibylla de Holdenbey, tenía 37 años. Se casó con John de Hardreshull aproximadamente 1267, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1318, en Redbourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
